blended.narrative: Stratton is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.4 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 516 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.3" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: light freezing drizzle, highs of 34°F.
Sunday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
